## Summary
- What changed and why.

## AI/Automation Context
- Model or agent used:
- Prompt/intent summary:
- Files touched by automation:
- Manual edits after automation:

## Validation
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `mypy src` (or explain why not run)
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed

## Safety Checks
- [ ] No secrets or credentials introduced
- [ ] Pricing/monetization behavior unchanged unless explicitly approved
- [ ] License/webhook behavior preserved
